creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
cad/salome and all subports depend on cad/salome-kernel, which expired on 2013-12-22 because it has been marked BROKEN for more than six months.

cad/salome also has the peculiar property that it depends on a *maximum* version number of lang/gcc44, and if I'm not mistaken the version in the ports tree is already too new.

Fix: Mark all salome ports as deprecated and schedule them for removal on 2014-01-22


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Tools/scripts/rmport cad/salome-kernel
